form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 6th of 10 at this track on March 15 over 3150m, 8 len behind Summer Way carrying 63kg at $21. Previously second-up 6th of 13 at Moulins on April 5 2025 over 2400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Rocheux with 58.5kg at $14. Can do much better this time with the run under her belt.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months won by 0.5 len at this track March 15 over 3150m defeating Mission Secrete carrying 58kg at $5.60. Previously second-up 2nd of 13 at Saint-Cloud on July 4 over 3000m, 1.75 len behind Joliepierre with 57kg at $3.80. No reason she cannot salute once again. In the money when second up in the past and can add to that record today.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 45 day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 7 at Pornichet on February 27 over 3100m, 2 len behind Un Jour Pour Moi carrying 58kg at $6.40. The run before that 4th of 9 at Machecoul on February 10 over 2950m, in the wet; 5.5 len behind La Bobride with 58kg at $7.20. Has ability and can measure up on best form.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign to post a big 4 len win. This track October 7 over 3150m slow track defeating Wukhann with 56.5kg at $2.80. When resuming last campaign third of 14 at Nantes April 9 2025 over 3100m, soft track; 1.2 len behind Zenita carrying 56kg at $5.40. Winning hope in a suitable contest.
